content.text:
That depends on your needs! Here are some options:

**If you want to practice more:**
- Try a similar problem with different speeds and times
- Work on problems with more than 2 segments
- Try problems where you need to find missing information (like distance or time)

**If you want to explore related concepts:**
- Learn about average velocity (includes direction)
- Study acceleration and how speed changes over time
- Work on distance-rate-time word problems

**If you're done:**
- Move on to another math topic
- Review any other questions you have

**What interests you most?** I can help with whichever direction you'd like to go!
